## Plan & Design — READY FOR PLAN-EVAL

MEASURE-FIRST complete. All findings re-baselined against the 4a+4b-merged umbrella (`1896f854`).

### MEASURE-FIRST table (per entrypoint)

**`@netscript/plugin-sagas-core` (19 entrypoints)**

| Entrypoint | ptr | jsdoc | total |
|-----------|-----|-------|-------|
| `./mod.ts` | 17 | 0 | 17 |
| `./src/abstracts/mod.ts` | 27 | 24 | 51 |
| `./src/adapters/mod.ts` | 23 | 23 | 46 |
| `./src/agent/mod.ts` | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| `./src/builders/mod.ts` | 14 | 0 | 14 |
| `./src/config/mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./src/contracts/v1/mod.ts` | 19 | 18 | 37 |
| `./src/domain/mod.ts` | 0 | 4 | 4 |
| `./src/integration/publisher/mod.ts` | 6 | 3 | 9 |
| `./src/integration/workers/mod.ts` | 8 | 2 | 10 |
| `./src/middleware/mod.ts` | 14 | 5 | 19 |
| `./src/ports/mod.ts` | 35 | 40 | 75 |
| `./src/presets/mod.ts` | 5 | 2 | 7 |
| `./src/runtime/mod.ts` | 58 | 48 | 106 |
| `./src/stores/mod.ts` | 11 | 8 | 19 |
| `./src/streams/mod.ts` | 4 | 0 | 4 |
| `./src/telemetry/mod.ts` | 6 | 53 | 59 |
| `./src/testing/mod.ts` | 34 | 43 | 77 |
| `./src/transports/mod.ts` | 24 | 84 | 108 |
| **TOTAL** | **48** | **349** | **397** |

**`@netscript/plugin-sagas` (12 entrypoints)**

| Entrypoint | ptr | jsdoc | total |
|-----------|-----|-------|-------|
| `./contracts/v1/mod.ts` | 17 | 26 | 43 |
| `./mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./services/src/main.ts` | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| `./src/aspire/mod.ts` | 7 | 0 | 7 |
| `./src/cli/mod.ts` | 11 | 7 | 18 |
| `./src/e2e/mod.ts` | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| `./src/plugin/mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./src/public/mod.ts` | 11 | 3 | 14 |
| `./src/runtime/mod.ts` | 16 | 6 | 22 |
| `./src/scaffolding/mod.ts` | 0 | 6 | 6 |
| `./streams/mod.ts` | 5 | 0 | 5 |
| `./streams/server.ts` | 6 | 3 | 9 |
| **TOTAL** | **71** | **51** | **122** |

**Family total: 519** (48 ptr + 349 jsdoc core + 71 ptr + 51 jsdoc plugin).

- Both `deno publish --dry-run --allow-dirty` → **PASS** (0 slow types).
- `deno check --unstable-kv` all 31 entrypoints → **PASS** (exit 0).

### Archetype + split decisions

| Decision | Locked value | Rationale |
|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Core archetype | **A3 (Runtime/Behavior)** | SagaEngine + SagaScheduler + state transitions + transport implementations + composition root = long-running stateful behavior |
| Plugin archetype | **A5 (Plugin Package)** | First-party plugin manifest, services, Aspire, CLI, scaffolding |
| Split | **4c-core / 4c-plugin** | 519 doc-lint + 31 entrypoints + 3 over-cap + 0-test plugin = ~27 slices; split gives headroom + respects dependency order |
| F-3 layering | **CLEAN** | Transports swappable behind `SagaTransportPort`; `stores/` is a deliberate pass-through barrel |
| F-1 splits | **3 files** | `v1.ts` (715) → handlers + helpers + types; `redis-transport.ts` (480) → class + commands; `list-transport.ts` (453) → class + commands |

### Slice count

- **4c-core**: 14 slices (C1–C14)
- **4c-plugin**: 13 slices (P1–P13)
- **Total: 27** (< 30 per sub-wave)

### PLAN-EVAL routing

**Option A**: One PLAN-EVAL over the combined plan, then separate IMPL-EVAL per sub-wave.

Artifacts: `research.md` + `plan.md` + `measure-doc-lint-{core,plugin}.json` + updated `drift.md` + `worklog.md`.

**Do NOT begin implementation. PLAN-EVAL is a separate session.**
@openhands-agent model=openrouter/qwen/qwen3.7-max output=pr-comment use harness proceed to PLAN-EVAL for this PR.

## OpenHands Agent — success

Model: `openrouter/qwen/qwen3.7-max`
Provider: `OPENROUTER`

# OpenHands Summary — Wave 4 · 4c sagas PLAN-EVAL

## Summary

Ran PLAN-EVAL for PR #20 (Wave 4 · 4c sagas — package quality) per `.llm/harness/evaluator/plan-protocol.md` and `gates/plan-gate.md`.

## Verdict

**`PASS`** — all 8 plan-gate checklist boxes satisfied. Implementation may begin.

### Checklist Results

| Plan-Gate item | Result | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| Research present and current | PASS | research.md dated 2026-06-09; re-baseline against `1896f854` (4a+4b merged umbrella) |
| Decisions locked | PASS | plan.md §1-§7: A3/A5 archetypes, split 14+13, surface locked, ptr-fix strategy, F-1 splits, test layer — all with rationale |
| Open-decision sweep | PASS | plan.md §13: 5 deferred decisions all marked safe-to-defer; evaluator sweep found no unlisted rework-forcing decisions |
| Commit slices (< 30, gate + files each) | PASS | 4c-core: 14 slices (C1-C14), 4c-plugin: 13 slices (P1-P13); total 27 < 30 |
| Risk register | PASS | plan.md §8: 6 risks with likelihood/impact/mitigation |
| Gate set selected | PASS | plan.md §11: full gate matrix cross-ref for A3/A5 |
| Deferred scope explicit | PASS | plan.md §9: 6 deferred items with reasons + target gates |
| jsr-audit surface scan | PASS | research.md §9: 19 core + 12 plugin entrypoints, 0 slow types, both dry-run PASS |

### Spot-Checks Performed

1. Over-cap file LOC verified against tree: `redis-transport.ts` 480, `list-transport.ts` 453, `v1.ts` 715
2. Missing tasks confirmed: core lacks `"test"` task; plugin lacks `"publish:dry-run"` task
3. Merge-base `1896f854` verified on both branches
4. F-3 layering audit: research.md §6 confirms "transports swappable behind port" with clean import graph
5. F-13 validation approach: C14 covers sweep + 4b workers precedent demonstrates A3 runtime validation achievable

### Evaluator Open-Decision Sweep

No unlisted decisions that would force rework if deferred.

## Changes

- Created: `.llm/tmp/run/feat-package-quality-wave4-runtimes--4c-sagas/plan-eval.md`

## Validation

Plan review only (no code changes per PLAN-EVAL protocol). Spot-checked load-bearing findings against the tree (file LOC, missing tasks, merge-base).

## Remaining Risks

None blocking implementation. Plan is complete and sound per plan-gate criteria.

### Slice 5/27 — C5 ports ptr-fix | Unit

**Unit:** `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core`
**Archetype:** A3 Runtime/Behavior
**Gate(s):** F-7 public docs, F-15 package surface, raw targeted check with `--unstable-kv`

**Changed:**
- Added explicit first-party saga domain/runtime type exports from `src/ports/mod.ts` for public port signatures.
- Added JSDoc to public port members across bus, transport, store, history, clock, outbox, agent runtime, and idempotency boundaries.

**Gate results:**
- PASS — raw `deno doc --lint src/ports/mod.ts` (`Checked 1 file`).
- PASS — raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 19 `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core` entrypoints.

**Drift:** None. Locked ptr-fix strategy followed: first-party references were made public through explicit type/value re-exports.

**Commits:**
- Implementation: `0ea4771` (`fix(sagas-core): publish port boundary contracts`)
- Harness record: `909e45e` (`docs(wave4-4c): record slice C5 core ports`)

### Slice 6/27 — C6 runtime ptr-fix | Unit

**Unit:** `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core`
**Archetype:** A3 Runtime/Behavior
**Gate(s):** F-7 public docs, F-15 package surface, raw targeted check with `--unstable-kv`

**Changed:**
- Added explicit first-party domain, port, and adapter type/value exports from `src/runtime/mod.ts` for runtime public signatures.
- Kept the slice scoped to private-type publication; no runtime behavior changes.

**Gate results:**
- PASS for C6 ptr-fix — raw `deno doc --lint src/runtime/mod.ts` exits 1 with `private-type-ref-count=0`; remaining 53 errors are `missing-jsdoc` assigned to locked C11.
- PASS — raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 19 `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core` entrypoints.

**Drift:** None. Locked ptr-fix strategy followed: first-party references were made public through explicit exports. C11 remains responsible for runtime JSDoc.

**Commits:**
- Implementation: `64711a1` (`fix(sagas-core): publish runtime boundary contracts`)
- Harness record: `f72e842` (`docs(wave4-4c): record slice C6 core runtime`)

### Slice 7/27 — C7 adapters/middleware/presets ptr-fix | Unit

**Unit:** `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core`

**Archetype:** A3 Runtime/Behavior

**Gate(s):** F-7 public docs, F-15 package surface, raw targeted `deno check --unstable-kv`

**Changed:** Published explicit first-party boundary type closure exports from `src/adapters/mod.ts`, `src/middleware/mod.ts`, and `src/presets/mod.ts`; replaced the public Hono middleware return/parameter types with package-owned structural `SagaMiddleware*` contracts. Preserved the locked ports/adapters/transports/stores/middleware layering.

**Gate results:** C7 ptr-fix PASS: raw `deno doc --lint src/adapters/mod.ts src/middleware/mod.ts src/presets/mod.ts` exits 1 with `private-type-ref-count=0`; 69 remaining `missing-jsdoc` diagnostics are assigned to later doc slices. Raw all-entrypoint `deno check --unstable-kv` PASS across all 19 core entrypoints.

**Drift:** None.

**Commits:** implementation `1a3a0f0`; paired docs `6e145ff`.

**Changed:** Published explicit first-party closure exports from `src/transports/mod.ts` and `src/stores/mod.ts` for transport, store, domain, idempotency, and literal-union constant dependencies. Preserved the locked role-named store barrel and did not perform the C13 transport concept split early.

Raw all-entrypoint `deno check --unstable-kv` PASS across all 19 core entrypoints.

**Drift:** None.

**Commits:** implementation `9e0fcba`; paired docs `515b86d`.

**Archetype:** A3 Runtime/Behavior

**Changed:** Documented transport public surface across list/redis clients, delayed processors, subscription records, ack handles, and transport classes; added first-party `SagaCorrelationKey` closure export from `src/transports/mod.ts`. No behavior/layering changes, no C13 split early.
**Gate results:** raw `deno doc --lint src/transports/mod.ts src/transports/list-transport.ts src/transports/redis-transport.ts src/transports/list-transport-delayed.ts src/transports/redis-transport-delayed.ts src/transports/list-transport-subscription.ts src/transports/redis-transport-subscription.ts` PASS (exit 0, `Checked 7 files`, zero `missing-jsdoc`, zero `private-type-ref`; ioredis/@types/node warning noise only); raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 19 core entrypoints PASS (exit 0).
**Drift:** None.
**Commits:** implementation `2ac8e04`; paired docs `44f01f3`.

### Slice 13/27 — C13 transport concept split | Unit

**Unit:** `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core`
**Archetype:** A3 Runtime/Behavior
**Gate(s):** F-1 file-size lint, F-13 runtime package concern isolation, raw targeted `deno doc --lint`, raw all-entrypoint `deno check --unstable-kv`
**Changed:** Split `src/transports/redis-transport.ts` into class/public re-export owner plus `redis-transport-commands.ts` for Redis Stream command/key/default-client/pending-claim helpers. Split `src/transports/list-transport.ts` into class/public re-export owner plus `list-transport-commands.ts` for LIST command/key/default-client/orphan-reclaim helpers. Closed AP-1 packages/sagas transport monolith debt in `.llm/harness/debt/arch-debt.md`. No port/adapter/store relayering.
**Gate results:** F-1 line counts PASS: `redis-transport.ts` 321, `redis-transport-commands.ts` 292, `list-transport.ts` 318, `list-transport-commands.ts` 303. Raw `deno doc --lint src/transports/mod.ts src/transports/list-transport.ts src/transports/redis-transport.ts` PASS (exit 0, zero `missing-jsdoc`, zero `private-type-ref`; ioredis/@types/node warning noise only). Raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 19 core entrypoints PASS (exit 0).
**Drift:** None.
**Commits:** implementation `cecfa65`; paired docs `d799dc3`.

### Slice 14/27 — C14 core validation sweep | Unit: @netscript/plugin-sagas-core | Archetype: A3 Runtime/Behavior

**Gate(s):** F-6, F-7, F-10, F-13, Runtime/Aspire, consumer-import

**Changed:** Closed residual full-export docs/lint/fmt findings for the core package. Added public-member docs for abstract/testing/adapter/helper surfaces, exported telemetry map type closures, fixed lint-only async/type-import/import-version findings, and scoped-format-checked the core package.

**Gate results:**
- Raw full-export `deno doc --lint` across all 19 entrypoints: PASS (`missing-jsdoc-count=0`, `private-type-ref-count=0`; ioredis/@types/node warning noise only)
- Helper doc-lint JSON: PASS (`totalErrors=0`)
- Raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 19 entrypoints: PASS

- Raw `deno fmt --check`: PASS
- `deno task test`: PASS (17 passed / 0 failed)
- F-13 runtime tests: PASS (13 passed / 0 failed)
- Runtime/Aspire entrypoint check (`plugins/sagas` Aspire + runtime): PASS; no AppHost files exist in this worktree
- Consumer-import: `plugins/triggers` PASS; `plugins/sagas` core-facing surfaces PASS; `packages/cli` PASS

**Drift:** Full `plugins/sagas` export check is recorded separately and currently fails in `plugins/sagas/streams/factory.ts` (`StreamStateDefinition` assignability). That file is in the locked plugin unit and remains pending for P-slices; core-facing sagas surfaces passed.

**Commits:** implementation `70c475b`; docs/evidence `7e3825c`.

### 4c-core COMPLETE — @netscript/plugin-sagas-core | A3 Runtime/Behavior

Core slices C1-C14 are implemented, pushed, and recorded with paired harness commits.

| Gate | Result | Evidence |
|---|---:|---|
| A3 declaration | PASS | `docs/architecture.md`; C1 |
| F-6 task hygiene | PASS | `check` enumerates all 19 entrypoints; `test` task added |
| F-7 full-export doc-lint | PASS | C14 raw `deno doc --lint` all 19: zero `missing-jsdoc`, zero `private-type-ref` |

| Runtime/Aspire validation | PASS | C14 `plugins/sagas` Aspire + runtime entrypoint check; no AppHost files found in worktree |
| Consumer import | PASS for core-facing surfaces | `plugins/triggers` PASS; `plugins/sagas` core-facing surfaces PASS; `packages/cli` PASS |
| F-1 file-size split | PASS | C13 line counts: Redis class 321, Redis commands 293, LIST class 318, LIST commands 303 |
| Arch debt AP-1 | CLOSED | C13 updated `.llm/harness/debt/arch-debt.md` |

Carry into plugin unit: the full `plugins/sagas` export check currently fails in `streams/factory.ts` with a stream-state type assignability issue. It is recorded as plugin-unit evidence and remains inside locked P-slice scope. Proceeding to P1-P13.

### Slice 15/27 — P1 F-6 plugin task hygiene | Unit: @netscript/plugin-sagas | Archetype: A5 Plugin Package

**Gate(s):** F-6 JSR publishability/task hygiene

**Changed:** `plugins/sagas/deno.json` now has `check` enumerating all 12 locked plugin entrypoints with `--unstable-kv`, and adds `publish:dry-run` as `deno publish --dry-run --allow-dirty`.

**Gate results:**
- Raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 12 plugin entrypoints: exits 1 in `plugins/sagas/streams/factory.ts` (`StreamStateDefinition` assignability)
- Raw `deno publish --dry-run --allow-dirty`: exits 1 on the same type error; `slow-type-count=0`

**Drift:** No scope change. This is the same plugin-unit stream type failure captured during C14 consumer-import. It remains pending for the locked plugin slices; P1 stayed limited to task hygiene.

**Commits:** implementation `ed4eae9`; docs/evidence `a6a45aa`.

### Slice 16/27 — P2 contract/root/public private-type refs | Unit: @netscript/plugin-sagas | Archetype: A5 Plugin Package

**Gate(s):** F-7, F-15

**Changed:** Replaced public upstream `PluginManifest`/contribution/oRPC/Zod references on the plugin root, public manifest, and contracts/v1 surfaces with package-owned structural manifest, contribution, schema, procedure, route, and router types. Kept the real plugin manifest builder, oRPC contract, and Zod schemas internal.

**Gate results:**
- Targeted raw `deno doc --lint mod.ts src/public/mod.ts contracts/v1/mod.ts`: exits 1 with `private-type-ref-count=0`; 3 remaining `missing-jsdoc` errors in `src/constants.ts` are assigned to the later docs slice
- Raw `deno check --unstable-kv` across all 12 plugin entrypoints: exits 1 only in `plugins/sagas/streams/factory.ts` (`StreamStateDefinition` assignability), the known pending plugin-unit issue

**Drift:** None. P2 stayed on private-type-ref closure; docs-only findings remain scheduled for P6, and stream typing remains pending in plugin scope.

**Commits:** implementation `bcab195`; docs/evidence `2ef6d6e`.

### Slice 17/27 — P3 plugin/Aspire/service private-type refs | Unit: @netscript/plugin-sagas | Archetype: A5 Plugin Package

Gate(s): F-7, F-15, Runtime/Aspire surface
Changed: re-exported P2 structural helper types from root/plugin entrypoints; replaced the sagas Aspire public surface with package-owned structural contribution/builder/resource/env/health types while preserving service/background resource registration behavior; re-exported first-party `PluginServiceContext` from the service entrypoint.
Gate results: targeted raw `deno doc --lint src/plugin/mod.ts src/aspire/mod.ts services/src/main.ts` PASS exit 0 with private=0 and missing=0 (`@types/node` warning noise only); raw all-entrypoint `deno check --unstable-kv` exits 1 only in the known `streams/factory.ts` `StreamStateDefinition` assignability issue pending plugin slice repair.
Drift: informational only, recorded in `drift.md`: local structural Aspire contribution types avoid leaking upstream `@netscript/aspire` private-type refs through the plugin docs surface. No slice expansion.
Commits: impl `54dfcfa`; docs `8962c6a`.

### Slice 18/27 — P4 CLI/runtime private-type refs | Unit: @netscript/plugin-sagas | Archetype: A5 Plugin Package

Gate(s): F-7, F-15, plugin public-surface closure
Changed: added explicit first-party type-closure exports from `@netscript/plugin/cli` and `@netscript/plugin-sagas-core` domain/runtime/publisher subpaths to the CLI and runtime entrypoints.
Gate results: targeted raw `deno doc --lint src/cli/mod.ts src/runtime/mod.ts` exits 1 with private=0 and missing=13, with remaining JSDoc assigned to P6/P7; raw all-entrypoint `deno check --unstable-kv` exits 1 only in the known `streams/factory.ts` `StreamStateDefinition` assignability issue pending plugin slice repair.
